value.found_quote: On February 8, 2024, Bard and Duet AI were unified under the Gemini brand, with a mobile app launched on Android and the service integrated into the Google app on iOS.
value.rationale: The page clearly substantiates that Google offers the Gemini app. It describes the launch of the Gemini mobile app on Android and iOS, its role as a virtual assistant overlay on Android devices, and ongoing updates including the app being available across multiple operating systems (Android, Wear OS, ChromeOS, iOS, iPadOS). The page shows active stable releases as recently as May 2026, indicating the app is currently active.
